context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct Postmark package and API patterns, applies the right MessageStream and tracking settings for transactional vs marketing sending, uses the template API correctly, and separates sending domains for transactional and marketing emails. Also covers DNS record configuration for deliverability.

checklist.name: Postmark npm package
checklist.description: Uses the 'postmark' npm package (importing ServerClient from 'postmark'), not an unofficial or generic HTTP client

checklist.name: API token from env
checklist.description: Instantiates ServerClient with the token sourced from an environment variable (e.g. process.env.POSTMARK_API_TOKEN)

checklist.name: Transactional MessageStream
checklist.description: Sets MessageStream to 'outbound' for transactional email sends

checklist.name: Marketing MessageStream
checklist.description: Sets MessageStream to 'broadcasts' for marketing/promotional email sends

checklist.name: TrackLinks None
checklist.description: Sets TrackLinks to 'None' for transactional email sends (link tracking disabled)

checklist.name: TrackOpens true
checklist.description: Sets TrackOpens to true for email sends

checklist.name: Template API used
checklist.description: Uses postmark.sendEmailWithTemplate() with TemplateAlias and TemplateModel for at least one template-based send

checklist.name: Separate sending domains
checklist.description: Uses distinct From addresses or domains for transactional and marketing emails (e.g. noreply@mystore.com vs newsletters@mail.mystore.com or equivalent domain separation)

checklist.name: SPF record documented
checklist.description: Includes or documents an SPF TXT record in the DNS setup section using v=spf1 syntax

checklist.name: DKIM records documented
checklist.description: Includes or documents DKIM CNAME records provided by the email provider in the DNS setup section

checklist.name: DMARC record documented
checklist.description: Includes or documents a DMARC TXT record (_dmarc.) in the DNS setup section

checklist.name: DMARC escalation policy
checklist.description: Documents the DMARC policy escalation approach: starting with p=none before moving to p=quarantine and then p=reject
